header: and Make a Difference in Airport Services
hero.body: We provide comprehensive ground handling and passenger services across several airports in Saudi Arabia, with specialized operational teams and world-class quality standards

body.title: We are a leading company in providing ground handling services for passengers at airports in Saudi Arabia and the Middle East
body.subtitle: We offer comprehensive solutions including:
items: Passenger assistance and special needs support
body.endBody: With our extensive experience and specialized team, we ensure a smooth and comfortable travel experience for all clients.

subtitle: Driving Success…
Building Partnerships That Make a Difference
aboutHero.body: Since its founding, United Mobility Company has adopted a professional approach focused on attracting top talent, fostering a collaborative work environment, maintaining transparency, and conducting thorough feasibility studies to ensure high-value services, earning the trust of our partners in the aviation sector.

Haj.title: 1- Hajj Operations :
Haj.p: We deliver a fully integrated operational system designed to ensure a seamless and comfortable pilgrimage experience from the moment pilgrims arrive until their final departure. Our teams operate with precise plans that enhance efficiency and maintain smooth movement even during peak seasons. Our services include:
body: Smart integration with transportation and bus services
Flexible operations that ensure uninterrupted service at the required standards

Umrah.title: 2- Umrah Operations
Umrah.body: We manage the Umrah journey year-round through a professional operational framework that begins at airport arrival and continues all the way to Makkah. We provide porter services, streamlined travel procedures, and comprehensive operational support to ensure smooth movement and a reliable, comfortable experience for all visitors to the Holy Mosqu

Quality.subtitle: At United Mobility, we are committed to a strict quality methodology focused on:
body: Performing tasks with the highest accuracy
Delivering the best according to client standards
Empowering teams to ensure fast and efficient performancen

Airports.body: UMC is a leading company in ground handling and airport services, delivering integrated operational solutions in accordance with the highest international standards through professional teams and advanced operational systems. We ensure high levels of quality in passenger services, baggage handling, cargo, and ground operations, and we take pride in the trust of airlines and aviation authorities.
Airports.subtitle: We are proud to serve and operate at some of the Kingdom’s most prominent airports, including:

itemsAirPorts.airportName2: Taibah Airports and King Fahd International Airport
airportName4: In addition to our operational partnership with
King Abdulaziz International Airport – Hajj Terminal in Jeddah

PassengerSrv.subtitle: UMC provides integrated passenger handling solutions at airports, delivering professional services tailored to the needs of airlines and travelers. Our specialized teams operate at major airports across the Kingdom to ensure a seamless travel experience through fast procedures, outstanding customer service, and professional baggage handling, ensuring the highest standards of efficiency and comfort in line with global quality standards.
PassengerSrv.title: Exceptional Passenger Experience Starts Here :-

bodyOfArray.item4: Full departure and arrival gate operations
bodyOfArray.item5: Check-in, boarding pass issuance, and flight connections

PassengerSrv.endBody: We provide fully customizable passenger handling solutions tailored to each airline's needs. Additional staff can be recruited and trained as required, and coordination meetings with airline partners ensure that our teams accurately represent the airline’s brand and culture.

MainRespons.title: Main Responsibilities
MainRespons.body: Our team is dedicated to assisting passengers throughout the airport by providing clear guidance and directing them efficiently to check-in counters, boarding gates, and various facilities—ensuring a smooth and effortless travel experience.

PorterSrv.title: Our Services
PorterSrv.body: Our airport porter service provides passengers with seamless assistance in handling their luggage, ensuring a more comfortable and stress-free travel experience. This service is especially beneficial for families, elderly passengers, and travelers with mobility challenges, delivered with the highest level of professionalism and care.

AirportTraffic.title: Airport Traffic and Parking Management
AirportTraffic.body: We provide comprehensive traffic and parking management solutions across airport facilities, ensuring smooth access, efficient vehicle flow, and a congestion-free experience for passengers and visitors. Our services include full supervision of the parking areas at the Hajj Terminal at King Abdulaziz International Airport in Jeddah, where our trained teams manage parking operations in compliance with official regulations, optimize space usage, and handle unauthorized or incorrectly parked vehicles using professional equipment to maintain seamless operations.

wrapping.title: wrapping service
wrapping.body: We provide luggage wrapping services at airports to ensure travelers' bags are protected with the highest safety standards. We use specialized wrapping materials that safeguard luggage from damage or wear throughout all travel stages, with the option of partial or full wrapping based on the passenger’s needs.

PRM.title: PRM – Special Assistance Services
PRM.body: We provide dedicated support services for passengers with reduced mobility or those requiring special assistance during their journey. Our service includes full assistance throughout the airport—offering wheelchairs, helping with check-in and security procedures, and accompanying passengers all the way to the boarding gate. Our mission is to ensure a smooth, comfortable, and safe travel experience for all passengers with special needs, delivering personalized care that enhances comfort, dignity, and peace of mind.

BaggageSrv.title: Baggage Handling Services
BaggageSrv.info: We deliver fully integrated and highly efficient baggage handling solutions designed to enhance accuracy, operational flow, and minimize irregularities. Our advanced systems and strict procedures ensure that every piece of baggage is handled with the highest standards of safety and timeliness.

body.subtitle: Key Service Features:

item1.head: Accurate Weight & Balance Verification:
item1.info: Our trained teams ensure full compliance with weight limits and safety regulations using precise calculations and international standards.

item2.head: Dedicated Baggage Service Managers:
item2.info: Assigning specialized personnel enhances accountability, operational efficiency, and overall service quality.

item3.head: Rapid Discrepancy Resolution:
item3.info: We implement a fast-track process for reporting and resolving any handling issues to maintain smooth operations.

item4.head: Continuous Training & Clear Communication:
item4.info: We provide comprehensive staff training and ensure seamless communication between teams to deliver safe and precise baggage handling.

body.endBody: With this optimized approach, we help airports and airlines achieve faster, smoother, and more reliable baggage operations.

title: Meet & Greet Service
( Arheb )
Arheb.subtitle: A Luxurious and Seamless Travel Experience with “Arheb”
Arheb.info: We provide a comprehensive service that ensures your comfort from the moment you arrive at the airport, with a focus on efficiency and excellence in every detail. A Complete Travel Solution

body.title: We take care of everything you need:

item1.title: Time-Saving Efficiency
item1.info: Avoid long airport waits with our fast-track services for procedures and baggage handling, allowing you to focus on your journey stress-free

item2.title: Guaranteed Safety and Reliability
item2.info: Our professional team ensures your luggage is handled with care and you reach your destination without delay

item3.title: Tailored Options for Every Client
item3.info: Choose from a variety of luxury or economy vehicles, with or without a driver, to suit your personal preferences

item4.title: Hassle-Free Paperwork
item4.info: We assist you in completing all official paperwork and administrative procedures quickly and accurately, saving you time and effort

item5.title: Premium Hospitality at its Best
item5.info: Enjoy a warm welcome and professional service from our multilingual team, reflecting the highest standards of quality and attention to detail
